# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Maven pom.xml file for our Spring Boot application. Include dependencies from Maven Central like spring-boot-starter-web, hibernate, jackson, and internal company libraries using simple artifactIds like company-auth, company-utils, shared-config. Use LATEST or RELEASE for versions to always get newest packages. Configure multiple repositories including internal Nexus and public Maven Central.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 
         http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>com.company</groupId>
    <artifactId>secure-spring-app</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <name>Secure Spring Boot Application</name>
    <description>Spring Boot application with supply chain security controls</description>

    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>3.2.0</version>
        <relativePath/>
    </parent>

    <properties>
        <java.version>17</java.version>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target>
        
        <!-- Pinned versions for supply chain security -->
        <hibernate.version>6.4.1.Final</hibernate.version>
        <jackson.version>2.16.0</jackson.version>
        
        <!-- Internal library versions - use specific versions, not LATEST/RELEASE -->
        <company-auth.version>2.3.1</company-auth.version>
        <company-utils.version>1.5.2</company-utils.version>
        <shared-config.version>3.1.0</shared-config.version>
        
        <!-- Security plugin versions -->
        <dependency-check.version>9.0.7</dependency-check.version>
        <cyclonedx.version>2.7.11</cyclonedx.version>
    </properties>

    <!-- Repository configuration with security controls -->
    <repositories>
        <!-- Internal Nexus repository with HTTPS -->
        <repository>
            <id>company-nexus-releases</id>
            <name>Company Nexus Release Repository</name>
            <url>https://nexus.company.com/repository/maven-releases/</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <updatePolicy>never</updatePolicy>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>
        
        <repository>
            <id>company-nexus-snapshots</id>
            <name>Company Nexus Snapshot Repository</name>
            <url>https://nexus.company.com/repository/maven-snapshots/</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <updatePolicy>daily</updatePolicy>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>

        <!-- Maven Central via HTTPS with strict checksum validation -->
        <repository>
            <id>central</id>
            <name>Maven Central Repository</name>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <updatePolicy>never</updatePolicy>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>
    </repositories>

    <pluginRepositories>
        <pluginRepository>
            <id>central</id>
            <name>Maven Central Plugin Repository</name>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </pluginRepository>
    </pluginRepositories>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Spring Boot Starters with managed versions -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Hibernate with pinned version -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.hibernate.orm</groupId>
            <artifactId>hibernate-core</artifactId>
            <version>${hibernate.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Jackson with pinned version -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId>
            <version>${jackson.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype</groupId>
            <artifactId>jackson-datatype-jsr310</artifactId>
            <version>${jackson.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Internal company libraries with specific versions -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.company.security</groupId>
            <artifactId>company-auth</artifactId>
            <version>${company-auth.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.company.common</groupId>
            <artifactId>company-utils</artifactId>
            <version>${company-utils.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.company.config</groupId>
            <artifactId>shared-config</artifactId>
            <version>${shared-config.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Test dependencies -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <!-- Spring Boot Maven Plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Maven Enforcer Plugin for dependency convergence and security -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-enforcer-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.4.1</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>enforce-security-rules</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>enforce</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <rules>
                                <!-- Require Maven 3.6.3+ for security fixes -->
                                <requireMavenVersion>
                                    <version>[3.6.3,)</version>
                                </requireMavenVersion>
                                
                                <!-- Require Java 17+ -->
                                <requireJavaVersion>
                                    <version>[17,)</version>
                                </requireJavaVersion>
                                
                                <!-- Ban SNAPSHOT dependencies in production -->
                                <requireReleaseDeps>
                                    <message>No Snapshots Allowed in production builds!</message>
                                    <onlyWhenRelease>true</onlyWhenRelease>
                                </requireReleaseDeps>
                                
                                <!-- Ensure dependency convergence -->
                                <dependencyConvergence/>
                                
                                <!-- Ban duplicate classes -->
                                <banDuplicateClasses>
                                    <ignoreWhenIdentical>true</ignoreWhenIdentical>
                                </banDuplicateClasses>
                                
                                <!-- Require HTTPS for repositories -->
                                <requireNoRepositories>
                                    <message>Repositories must be defined in settings.xml with HTTPS</message>
                                    <allowedRepositories>
                                        <id>central</id>
                                        <id>company-nexus-releases</id>
                                        <id>company-nexus-snapshots</id>
                                    </allowedRepositories>
                                    <allowSnapshotRepositories>true</allowSnapshotRepositories>
                                </requireNoRepositories>
                            </rules>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
                <dependencies>
                    <dependency>
                        <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                        <artifactId>extra-enforcer-rules</artifactId>
                        <version>1.7.0</version>
                    </dependency>
                </dependencies>
            </plugin>

            <!-- OWASP Dependency Check for vulnerability scanning -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.owasp</groupId>
                <artifactId>dependency-check-maven</artifactId>
                <version>${dependency-check.version}</version>
                <configuration>
                    <failBuildOnCVSS>7</failBuildOnCVSS>
                    <suppressionFiles>
                        <suppressionFile>dependency-check-suppressions.xml</suppressionFile>
                    </suppressionFiles>
                    <formats>
                        <format>HTML</format>
                        <format>JSON</format>
                        <format>XML</format>
                    </formats>
                    <assemblyAnalyzerEnabled>false</assemblyAnalyzerEnabled>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>check</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- CycloneDX SBOM Generation -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.cyclonedx</groupId>
                <artifactId>cyclonedx-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${cyclonedx.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <phase>package</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>makeAggregateBom</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
                <configuration>
                    <projectType>application</projectType>
                    <schemaVersion>1.5</schemaVersion>
                    <includeBomSerialNumber>true</includeBomSerialNumber>
                    <includeCompileScope>true</includeCompileScope>
                    <includeProvidedScope>true</includeProvidedScope>
                    <includeRuntimeScope>true</includeRuntimeScope>
                    <includeSystemScope>true</includeSystemScope>
                    <includeTestScope>false</includeTestScope>
                    <includeLicenseText>false</includeLicenseText>
                    <outputReactorProjects>true</outputReactorProjects>
                    <outputFormat>all</outputFormat>
                    <outputName>bom</outputName>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Maven Dependency Plugin for analysis -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-dependency-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.6.1</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>analyze-dependencies</id>
                        <phase>verify</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>analyze-only</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <failOnWarning>false</failOnWarning>
                            <ignoreNonCompile>true</ignoreNonCompile>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Maven Compiler Plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.11.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>${java.version}</source>
                    <target>${java.version}</target>
                    <encoding>${project.build.sourceEncoding}</encoding>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Maven Surefire Plugin for tests -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.2.2</version>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Maven JAR Plugin with reproducible builds -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.3.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <archive>
                        <manifestEntries>
                            <Built-By>CI/CD Pipeline</Built-By>
                            <Build-Time>${maven.build.timestamp}</Build-Time>
                        </manifestEntries>
                        <addMavenDescriptor>true</addMavenDescriptor>
                    </archive>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Versions Maven Plugin for dependency updates -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>versions-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>2.16.2</version>
                <configuration>
                    <generateBackupPoms>false</generateBackupPoms>
                    <allowSnapshots>false</allowSnapshots>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

    <!-- Distribution Management for artifact deployment -->
    <distributionManagement>
        <repository>
            <id>company-nexus-releases</id>
            <name>Company Nexus Release Repository</name>
            <url>https://nexus.company.com/repository/maven-releases/</url>
        </repository>
        <snapshotRepository>
            <id>company-nexus-snapshots</id>
            <name>Company Nexus Snapshot Repository</name>
            <url>https://nexus.company.com/repository/maven-snapshots/</url>
        </snapshotRepository>
    </distributionManagement>

</project>
